pi_items.source: setup_task.sh explicit instructions and export_result.sh queries

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for openvsp_twin_fuselage_conversion task by confirming that the task operates on the real NASA eCRM-001 conceptual aircraft model, while the twin-fuselage conversion specification is synthetically generated via setup_task.sh. Verified that the expected output path '/home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/twin_fuselage_launcher.vsp3' and all required parameters (Y=14.0m, wing span=75.0m, wing root chord=10.0m, htail span=25.0m) exactly match the explicit instructions provided in the prompt and setup_task.sh script. Discovered a critical defect: 'verifier.py' attempts to split the XML content using the regex '<Component>.*?</Component>', but OpenVSP (.vsp3) files use the '<Geom>' tag instead of '<Component>'. Consequently, the verifier will perpetually fail to parse any components and cap the score at 10, rendering the task programmatically unscorable.
